Osimertinib for previously untreated EGFR-positive non-small-cell lung cancer

Published: 3 March 2026

Recommendations

1.1 Osimertinib is not recommended, within its marketing authorisation, for untreated EGFR mutation-positive non-small-cell lung cancer in adults.

Why the committee made this recommendation

The trial used an indirect comparison against a comparator that does not reflect current NHS practice. Progression-free survival was used as a surrogate endpoint and the overall survival data remain immature. The committee concluded that the incremental cost-effectiveness ratio was above the range normally considered a cost-effective use of NHS resources, and was highly uncertain. Osimertinib is therefore not recommended.

2 The technology

Osimertinib (Tagrisso) is a tyrosine kinase inhibitor.
